title: ProcessMaker Process Request
description: Schema for a ProcessMaker process request (case instance)

id.description: Unique identifier for the process request

process_id.description: ID of the process this request is an instance of

user_id.description: ID of the user who initiated the request

process_collaboration_id.description: ID of the collaboration if this is a collaborative process

status.description: Current status of the process request

name.description: Display name of the process request

data.description: Data payload associated with the process request

created_at.description: Timestamp when the request was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the request was last updated

completed_at.description: Timestamp when the request was completed
